lines.speaker: 0017_ROYL
lines.text: I know who you are. Not because I am clever -- because it is my job and I am good at my job. What can I do for you.

lines.speaker: 0017_ROYL
lines.text: The Lottery is the city's official face. What actually runs Azonithia is information: who has it, who doesn't, how fast it moves. I move it. I get paid for it. It is a clean arrangement as long as everyone is honest about what they are doing.

lines.speaker: 0017_ROYL
lines.text: I maintain the district radio network. Twelve receivers, four transmitters, one broadcast window per night. Most of what goes out is mundane: market prices, weather, aqueduct schedules. Some of it is not. The not-mundane is what I charge for and keep filed.
